name: State Trajectory is a Function
description: Theorem stating that the state trajectory is a total, single-valued function from TZ to SZ, satisfying FNS(TZ, SZ).

elements.text: STZ(f, x) ∈ FNS(TZ, SZ) for any f ∈ ITZ and x ∈ SZ.
Deduction (ii): For all t ∈ TZ, there exists y ∈ SZ such that (t, y) ∈ STZ(f, x).
Deduction (iii): If (t1, y1) ∈ STZ(f, x) and (t2, y2) ∈ STZ(f, x) and t1 = t2, then y1 = y2 (induction proof).
